message: The notification settings page is completely blank on Firefox 121. Works fine in Chrome. We have 50 users on Firefox and they all report the same issue. Please fix this ASAP - it's affecting our entire workflow. We need notifications to coordinate across time zones. This is really frustrating as we've been paying customers for 2 years and the quality has been declining. I've already filed 3 bug reports this month alone and none have been addressed. Our team leads are losing patience and we're considering alternatives if this doesn't improve soon. I'm not threatening to leave but I need to see some improvement in response times and bug fix turnaround. The platform used to be so reliable and now every update seems to break something new.
The notification settings page is completely blank on Firefox 121. Works fine in Chrome.
